approved_command_preview: Finalize Gemini prime-agent source/runtime manifest categories and align compile/validate checks so chunk files are source-required/source-only, not runtime/operator-facing required files.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
Set-Location $env:DCOIR_REPO_ROOT
git config user.name 'chatgpt-exec'
git config user.email 'chatgpt-exec@users.noreply.github.com'
git pull --ff-only origin main
$py = @'
import json
from pathlib import Path

root = Path.cwd()
manifest_path = root / 'project_sources/gemini/bundle_source/Gemini_Bundle_Source_Manifest.json'
compile_path = root / 'project_sources/gemini/tools/compile_dcoir_gemini_bundle.py'
validate_path = root / 'project_sources/gemini/tools/validate_dcoir_gemini_bundle.py'

manifest = json.loads(manifest_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
topology = manifest.setdefault('topology', {})
prime_rel = topology.get('prime_agent_file')
chunk_manifest_rel = manifest.get('prime_agent_chunk_manifest') or topology.get('prime_agent_chunk_manifest')
chunk_sources = list(topology.get('prime_agent_chunk_sources', []))
if not prime_rel or not chunk_manifest_rel or not chunk_sources:
    raise SystemExit('Gemini manifest missing prime/chunk topology fields')
source_required = [chunk_manifest_rel, *chunk_sources]
manifest['prime_agent_source_mode'] = 'chunked_reassembled'
manifest['prime_agent_runtime_mode'] = 'generated_from_chunks'
manifest['prime_agent_chunk_manifest'] = chunk_manifest_rel
manifest['runtime_generated_files'] = [prime_rel]
manifest['source_required_files'] = source_required
manifest['source_only_dirs'] = ['01_GEMINI_AGENT_BUILD/prime_agent_chunks']
manifest['source_only_files'] = source_required
topology['prime_agent_runtime_mode'] = 'generated_from_chunks'
topology['prime_agent_chunk_manifest'] = chunk_manifest_rel
topology['prime_agent_chunk_sources'] = chunk_sources
remove_from_required = set(source_required + [prime_rel])
manifest['required_files'] = [rel for rel in manifest.get('required_files', []) if rel not in remove_from_required]
manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(manifest, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

compile_text = compile_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
if

)
validate_path.write_text(validate_text, encoding='utf-8')

print(json.dumps({'updated': [str(manifest_path), str(compile_path), str(validate_path)], 'source_required_count': len(source_required)}, indent=2))
'@
$script = Join-Path $env:DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR 'gemini_source_runtime_contract.py'
$py | Set-Content -LiteralPath $script -Encoding utf8NoBOM
python $script
python -m py_compile project_sources/gemini/tools/compile_dcoir_gemini_bundle.py project_sources/gemini/tools/validate_dcoir_gemini_bundle.py project_sources/gemini/tools/build_dcoir_gemini_release.py project_sources/gemini/tools/reassemble_dcoir_gemini_prime_agent.py
git add -- project_sources/gemini/bundle_source/Gemini_Bundle_Source_Manifest.json project_sources/gemini/tools/compile_dcoir_gemini_bundle.py project_sources/gemini/tools/validate_dcoir_gemini_bundle.py
if (git diff --cached --quiet) { Write-Host 'No source/runtime contract changes to commit.' } else { git commit -m 'Finalize Gemini prime source runtime contract'; git push origin HEAD:main }
$statusAfter = git status --porcelain
if ($statusAfter) { throw "Worktree is not clean after contract commit: $($statusAfter -join '; ')" }
